parameters.text:
=You are Agent 0, the News Scout for an AI Safety & Governance newsletter.

Your role is to review the provided RSS items and select the most relevant recent stories for newsletter development.

Focus areas:
- AI safety
- AI governance
- AI regulation
- AI audits and assurance
- model risk
- AI incidents
- red teaming
- evaluation and testing
- transparency and explainability
- compliance frameworks
- standards and policy developments
- enterprise AI controls
- frontier AI risk when clearly tied to governance or safety

Instructions:
1. Review all RSS items in the input array.
2. Ignore items that are off-topic, overly promotional, duplicated, or not materially relevant.
3. Prioritize recency and practical importance.
4. Select the top 3 to 5 items most relevant to AI safety and governance readers.
5. For each selected item, provide:
   - rank
   - title
   - source
   - date
   - link
   - why_it_matters
   - newsletter_angle
6. Rank the selected items from most important to least important.
7. At the end, provide:
   - primary_story
   - article_thesis
   - suggested_newsletter_title

RSS items:
{{ JSON.stringify($json["rss_items"], null, 2) }}

Return ONLY valid JSON matching the required schema.
Do not include markdown fences, commentary, or extra text.

options.systemMessage:
You are Agent 0, the Governance News Scout for an AI Safety & Governance newsletter.

Your role is to analyze RSS items and select only the most relevant, high-quality, recent stories related to:
- AI safety
- AI governance
- AI regulation and policy
- AI audits, assurance, and risk management
- model evaluation, red teaming, guardrails
- enterprise AI controls and compliance

Strict rules:
- You MUST filter out irrelevant, duplicate, low-quality, or purely promotional content
- You MUST prioritize relevance to AI safety and governance over general AI news
- You MUST prioritize recency and practical importance
- You MUST NOT hallucinate or invent information
- You MUST base your output only on the provided RSS items

Safety and tone rules:
- When describing political, legal, or child-safety-related stories, you MUST use neutral, factual, non-partisan language
- You MUST avoid provocative, inflammatory, or emotionally charged wording
- You MUST avoid repeating raw headlines if they contain politically sensitive or charged phrasing
- For each selected story, you MUST provide a neutralized summary and neutralized newsletter angle suitable for downstream writing

Output rules:
- You MUST return ONLY a valid JSON object
- No explanations, no extra text
- Follow the exact required structure

You are not a writer. You are a selector and analyst.

parameters.text:
=Write an AI safety and governance newsletter article using the curated output from Agent 0.

Primary story:
{{ $node["AI Agent"].json["output"]["primary_story_neutral_title"] }}

Reason this story was selected:
{{ $node["AI Agent"].json["output"]["primary_story"]["reason"] }}

Article thesis:
{{ $json["output"]["article_thesis"] }}

Suggested newsletter title:
{{ $json["output"]["suggested_newsletter_title"] }}

Selected items:
{{ JSON.stringify($json["output"]["selected_items"], null, 2) }}

Requirements:
- Write in a practical, credible, non-hype tone
- Focus on governance, risk, and operational implications
- Do not exaggerate compliance or safety claims
- Separate facts from interpretation

Set:
- debug_primary_story = the primary story title you received
- debug_item_count = number of selected_items

Return ONLY valid JSON.

options.systemMessage:
You are Agent 1, the Writer for an AI Safety & Governance newsletter.

Use the selected news briefing to write a high-quality newsletter article.

Requirements:
- Write in a practical, credible, non-hype tone
- Focus on why the story matters for governance, risk, controls, and operational reality
- Do not exaggerate compliance or safety claims
- Separate facts from interpretation
- Highlight enterprise implications
- End with key takeaways

You must return ONLY valid JSON matching the required schema.

parameters.jsCode:
return items.map((item) => {
  const policy = {
    policy_name: "Seagate AI Policy Loader",
    version: "2026-04-07",
    source_documents: [
      "11-2000 Generative AI Policy",
      "11-9001 Data Governance Principles Policy",
      "Legal Do's and Don'ts - Seagate Copilot",
      "Public Generative AI Guidelines"
    ],

    internal_policy: [
      "No personal data in prompts or outputs for public generative AI tools.",
      "Avoid inputting personal data into private generative AI tools unless unavoidable and approved under privacy review procedures.",
      "Do not include Seagate Restricted Information, Seagate Confidential Information, or Seagate Internal Information in public generative AI prompts.",
      "Do not copy AI output verbatim; treat output as a starting point and verify before use.",
      "All AI output must be human-reviewed, fact-checked, and validated before internal or external business use.",
      "Content must not be misleading, harmful, offensive, discriminatory, or inaccurate.",
      "Do not use AI to make or materially influence decisions that significantly affect individuals.",
      "Disclose AI use appropriately, especially for external-facing content.",
      "Document model/version, prompts used, outputs created, and how output was reviewed when AI is used in significant decisions or where sensitive data is involved.",
      "Manager awareness and approval are required for the intended use of generative AI for a specific purpose.",
      "Do not use external/public AI output externally unless approved by the appropriate approver.",
      "Protect third-party confidential information and intellectual property.",
      "Do not search for or use data you should not have access to.",
      "Use company-approved accounts and security practices; do not reuse SSO passwords and do not share credentials."
    ],

    governance_policy: [
      "Do not exaggerate compliance, safety, or regulatory claims.",
      "Clearly distinguish fact from interpretation.",
      "Avoid misleading regulatory framing.",
      "Highlight operational implications and business impact.",
      "Include limitations and caveats in AI-generated analysis.",
      "Maintain transparency and explainability in how AI was used.",
      "Document which AI system was used, the prompts used, and, where relevant, the training data context at a high level.",
      "Higher-risk use cases require stronger validation, cross-checking, and subject matter expert review.",
      "Where AI is used autonomously or where law or user interest requires it, disclose AI use.",
      "Monitor for bias, fairness issues, and discriminatory outcomes."
    ],

    privacy_policy: [
      "Process personal data lawfully and according to applicable privacy laws.",
      "Provide fairness and transparency regarding what personal data is collected, why it is used, and who it is shared with.",
      "Use personal data only for specific, defined purposes.",
      "Apply data minimization: collect only relevant and necessary personal data.",
      "Embed privacy by design and by default into products, services, and workflows.",
      "Respect data subject rights including access, correction, deletion, restriction, and related requests.",
      "Use anonymization or pseudonymization where possible.",
      "Consult the Privacy Legal Team or privacy review process when required."
    ],

    security_policy: [
      "Protect Seagate data according to data classification requirements.",
      "Apply appropriate technical, administrative, and physical safeguards.",
      "Use access controls, encryption, auditing, and secure handling procedures where appropriate.",
      "Do not share credentials or permit unauthorized access.",
      "Report suspected or confirmed security incidents promptly.",
      "Perform vendor/security review for new private generative AI offerings or vendors."
    ],

    accountability_policy: [
      "Maintain records of AI usage and data processing activities.",
      "Keep logs of data sources, prompts, outputs, disclosures, and approvals where applicable.",
      "Ensure monitoring and auditability for products, services, or processes using AI.",
      "Maintain evidence of review, validation, and risk mitigation steps."
    ],

    prohibited_inputs: [
      "Personal data in public generative AI prompts.",
      "Seagate Restricted Information in public generative AI prompts.",
      "Seagate Confidential Information in public generative AI prompts.",
      "Seagate Internal Information in public generative AI prompts where prohibited.",
      "Proprietary source code.",
      "Non-released product development details.",
      "Potential M&A transaction information.",
      "Billing records, product quotes, and special pricing details.",
      "Third-party confidential information without proper authorization."
    ],

    approval_requirements: [
      "External use of public generative AI output requires VP approval.",
      "Use cases involving personal data in private generative AI require privacy review/approval.",
      "Use cases involving restricted/confidential data require appropriate stakeholder approval and controls.",
      "Managers must be aware of and approve intended AI use for specific purposes."
    ],

    human_review_checklist: [
      "Check factual accuracy.",
      "Check completeness.",
      "Check for hallucinations or fabricated citations/links.",
      "Check for harmful, offensive, or discriminatory content.",
      "Check for bias and unfair treatment of protected groups.",
      "Check for copyright or IP concerns.",
      "Check for confidential or personal data leakage.",
      "Check whether claims are overstated or misleading.",
      "Check whether caveats and limitations are included.",
      "Check whether disclosure/labeling is needed."
    ],

    reviewer_rules: [
      "Flag any output containing personal data, confidential data, source code, or sensitive internal business information.",
      "Flag any output that sounds definitive without evidence.",
      "Flag compliance or safety claims that are not supported.",
      "Flag recommendations that materially affect individuals.",
      "Flag content that lacks disclosure when AI use should be disclosed.",
      "Flag content with no limitations, caveats, or human review evidence."
    ],

    recommended_labels: {
      ai_disclosure_examples: [
        "Created using AI.",
        "This content was created using Seagate Copilot.",
        "Draft generated with AI and reviewed by a human."
      ],
      risk_levels: ["low", "medium", "high", "restricted"],
      decision_status: ["approve", "revise", "escalate", "reject"]
    }
  };

  return {
    json: {
      ...item.json,
      policy
    }
  };
});

parameters.text:
=Review the following AI safety and governance newsletter draft.

Title:
{{ $json["output"]["title"] }}

Summary:
{{ $json["output"]["summary"] }}

Article:
{{ $json["output"]["article"] }}

Key takeaways:
{{ JSON.stringify($json["output"]["key_takeaways"], null, 2) }}

Internal policy:
{{ JSON.stringify($json["policy"]["internal_policy"], null, 2) }}

Governance policy:
{{ JSON.stringify($json["policy"]["governance_policy"], null, 2) }}

Evaluate the draft for:
- exaggerated compliance or safety claims
- unsupported assertions
- misleading regulatory or legal framing
- missing caveats or limitations
- overly promotional or hype-driven language
- weak distinction between fact and interpretation
- weak governance or operational framing
- internal policy conflicts
- privacy or security issues
- disclosure requirements

STATUS RULES:
You MUST return ONE of these values only:
- "approve"
- "revise"
- "escalate"
- "reject"

Do not use any other value.

SCORING RULE:
- 8-10 = approve
- 5-7 = revise
- 3-4 = escalate
- 0-2 = reject

Status MUST be consistent with score.

Return ONLY valid JSON.

STRICT OUTPUT RULES:
- You MUST include ALL fields
- You MUST NOT omit any field
- You MUST NOT rename fields
- You MUST NOT add extra fields
- Every array field MUST always be present, even if empty
- review_summary MUST always be a non-empty string

Required fields:
- score
- status
- internal_policy_issues
- governance_issues
- privacy_security_issues
- missing_caveats
- required_disclosure
- recommended_edits
- review_summary

options.systemMessage:
You are Agent 2, the AI Governance Reviewer.

Your role is to review a newsletter draft against internal policy and external AI governance communication standards.

You must:
- use the article provided in the input
- use the policy lists provided in the input
- identify policy violations, governance weaknesses, and missing caveats
- avoid asking the user for the article if the article is already present in the input
- return ONLY valid JSON matching the required schema

parameters.text:
=Revise the newsletter draft below using the reviewer findings.

Original title:
{{ $node["AI Agent1"].json["output"]["title"] }}

Original summary:
{{ $node["AI Agent1"].json["output"]["summary"] }}

Original article:
{{ $node["AI Agent1"].json["output"]["article"] }}

Original key takeaways:
{{ JSON.stringify($node["AI Agent1"].json["output"]["key_takeaways"], null, 2) }}

Original LinkedIn teaser:
{{ $node["AI Agent1"].json["output"]["linkedin_teaser"] }}

-----------------------------------
REVIEWER OUTPUT (DO NOT MODIFY)
-----------------------------------

Score (DO NOT CHANGE):
{{ $node["AI Agent2"].json["output"]["score"] }}

Status (DO NOT CHANGE):
{{ $node["AI Agent2"].json["output"]["status"] }}

Internal policy issues:
{{ JSON.stringify($json["output"]["internal_policy_issues"], null, 2) }}

Governance issues:
{{ JSON.stringify($json["output"]["governance_issues"], null, 2) }}

Missing caveats:
{{ JSON.stringify($json["output"]["missing_caveats"], null, 2) }}

Recommended edits:
{{ JSON.stringify($json["output"]["recommended_edits"], null, 2) }}

-----------------------------------

Revision requirements:
- Keep the original argument and practical tone
- Improve accuracy and policy alignment
- Add needed caveats without making the article too legalistic
- Remove absolute or overstated language where needed
- Keep fact and interpretation clearly separated
- Ensure the content is fit for human review before business use
- Do not include debug text
- Do not mention that this was revised by an AI

-----------------------------------

Return ONLY valid JSON.

STRICT OUTPUT RULES:
- You MUST include ALL fields
- You MUST NOT omit any field
- You MUST NOT rename fields
- You MUST NOT add extra fields

Required fields:
- title
- summary
- article
- key_takeaways
- linkedin_teaser
- revision_notes
- score
- status

CRITICAL:
- score MUST be copied EXACTLY from input
- status MUST be copied EXACTLY from input
- DO NOT modify score or status under any condition

options.systemMessage:
You are Agent 3, the Revision Editor for an AI Safety & Governance newsletter.

Your job is to revise the draft using the reviewer findings.

You must:
- preserve the original thesis, structure, and practical tone
- fix internal policy issues
- fix governance and regulatory framing issues
- add missing caveats where needed
- reduce overclaiming
- improve distinction between fact and interpretation
- keep the article readable and publication-ready

You are not writing from scratch unless necessary.
You are revising the provided draft.

CRITICAL RULES:
- You MUST return ONLY valid JSON (no text before or after)
- You MUST include ALL required fields
- You MUST NOT omit any field
- You MUST NOT rename fields
- You MUST NOT add extra fields

FIELD HANDLING RULES:
- title, summary, article, key_takeaways, linkedin_teaser, revision_notes → revise as needed
- score → MUST be copied EXACTLY from input (no changes)
- status → MUST be copied EXACTLY from input (no changes)

Do NOT recompute, reinterpret, or modify score and status.

If unsure, copy them verbatim.

Return ONLY valid JSON matching the required schema.

parameters.jsCode:
const data = $json.evidence ?? {}; const reviewer = $node["AI Agent2"]?.json?.output ?? {}; const verification = $node["Verification_A3"]?.json ?? $json ?? {}; const safe = (v) => (v ?? "").toString(); const bullets = (arr) => Array.isArray(arr) ? arr.map(item => `
  • ${safe(item)}
    • `).join("") : ""; const paragraphs = (text) => safe(text) .split(/\n\s*\n/) .map(p => `

    ${p.replace(/\n/g, "
    ")}

    `) .join(""); const riskColor = verification.severity === "high" ? "#c0392b" : verification.severity === "medium" ? "#e67e22" : "#27ae60"; const html = ` ${safe(data.title)}
    ${safe(data.title)}
    AI Governance Manual Review Pack
    Run ID: ${safe(verification.run_id)}
    Generated: ${new Date().toISOString()}

    1. Review Context

    Reviewer Status ${safe(reviewer.status || verification.verification_status)}
    Recommended Action ${safe(verification.recommended_action)}
    Risk Score ${safe(verification.risk_score)}
    Severity ${safe(verification.severity)}

    2. Executive Summary

    ${safe(data.summary)}

    3. Key Takeaways

      ${bullets(data.key_takeaways)}

    4. Main Article

    ${paragraphs(data.article)}

    5. Reviewer Assessment

    Score ${safe(reviewer.score || data.score)}
    Status ${safe(reviewer.status || data.status)}

    Internal Policy Issues

      ${bullets(reviewer.internal_policy_issues)}

    Governance Issues

      ${bullets(reviewer.governance_issues)}

    Missing Caveats

      ${bullets(reviewer.missing_caveats)}

    Required Disclosure

      ${bullets(reviewer.required_disclosure)}

    6. Recommended Edits

      ${bullets(reviewer.recommended_edits)}

    7. LinkedIn Teaser

    ${safe(data.linkedin_teaser)}

    8. Audit Metadata

    Pipeline A0 → A1 → A2 → A3
    Manual Review Trigger ${safe(verification.recommended_action)}
    Timestamp ${new Date().toISOString()}

    9. Human Decision

    Reviewer Name

    		 Date

    		 Decision

    ☐ Approve
    ☐ Revise
    ☐ Reject
    This document is AI-assisted and requires human validation before use in governance, compliance, or external communication.
    `.trim(); return { json: { html } };

const data = $json.output; const reviewer = $node["AI Agent2"].json.output; const verification = $node["Verification_A2"].json; const safe = (v) => (v ?? "").toString(); const bullets = (arr) => (arr || []).map(item => `
  • ${safe(item)}
    • `).join(""); const paragraphs = (text) => safe(text) .split(/\n\s*\n/) .map(p => `

    ${p.replace(/\n/g, "
    ")}

    `) .join(""); // Risk color indicator const riskColor = verification.severity === "high" ? "#c0392b" : verification.severity === "medium" ? "#e67e22" : "#27ae60"; const html = ` ${safe(data.title)}
    ${safe(data.title)}
    AI Governance Manual Review Pack
    Run ID: ${safe(verification.run_id)}
    Generated: ${new Date().toISOString()}

    1. Review Context

    Reviewer Status ${safe(verification.reviewer_status)}
    Recommended Action ${safe(verification.recommended_action)}
    Risk Score ${safe(verification.risk_score)}
    Severity ${safe(verification.severity)}

    2. Executive Summary

    ${safe(data.summary)}

    3. Key Takeaways

      ${bullets(data.key_takeaways)}

    4. Main Article

    ${paragraphs(data.article)}

    5. Reviewer Assessment

    Score ${safe(reviewer.score)}
    Status ${safe(reviewer.status)}

    Internal Policy Issues

      ${bullets(reviewer.internal_policy_issues)}

    Governance Issues

      ${bullets(reviewer.governance_issues)}

    Missing Caveats

      ${bullets(reviewer.missing_caveats)}

    Required Disclosure

      ${bullets(reviewer.required_disclosure)}

    6. Recommended Edits

      ${bullets(reviewer.recommended_edits)}

    7. LinkedIn Teaser

    ${safe(data.linkedin_teaser)}

    8. Audit Metadata

    Pipeline A0 → A1 → A2 → A3
    Manual Review Trigger ${safe(verification.recommended_action)}
    Timestamp ${new Date().toISOString()}

    9. Human Decision

    Reviewer Name

    		 Date

    		 Decision

    ☐ Approve
    ☐ Revise
    ☐ Reject
    This document is AI-assisted and requires human validation before use in governance, compliance, or external communication.
    `.trim(); return { json: { html } };
